notes: Captured evidence covers Admin customer address create/update/delete/default-address roots, downstream customer/customerByIdentifier/customers address reads, unknown-customer payload userErrors, unknown-address RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND GraphQL errors, cross-customer address ownership userErrors, blank/invalid/duplicate address branches, default-address deletion, setAsDefault omitted/false behavior, customerSet address replacement, and a bounded maximum-address probe. Runtime parity is covered by integration tests while the generic parity runner lacks multi-step mutation chaining between target proxy requests.
